title: A Complete Electron Microscopy Volume of the Brain of Adult Drosophila melanogaster
abstract: We describe a complete EM volume of the brain of adult Drosophila melanogaster at synaptic resolution. The dataset establishes a structural scaffold for models of circuit function across the fly brain and enables comparisons of circuit architecture across species.
notes: Already in existing 102. The FAFB dataset that enabled FlyWire.
